steps.title: Attach the opening phrase
steps.content: "Upon recovering two years later" must describe Henry VI, because he is the person who recovered from illness.

steps.title: Choose the logical subject
steps.content: The main clause must therefore begin with Henry as the subject. B and C illogically make the reign recover, and D places the vague pronoun "it" after the modifier. The participial opening needs the person who recovered, not an abstract noun or placeholder pronoun. The answer is A.
